sections.title: Accessibility Training Academy
sections.description:
At Accessibility Innovations, we believe that accessibility training is essential for creating inclusive environments while meeting compliance needs. Our Accessibility Training Academy in United States equips organizations with the knowledge and skills necessary to implement accessibility at all levels.

Whether you’re a small business or a global enterprise, our tailored training programs empower your team to comply with legal requirements, champion inclusivity, and build sustainable accessibility practices. From foundational principles to advanced techniques, we’ve got your accessibility journey covered.

image.alt: An illustration of a group brainstorming around a mobile device. A person is speaking and some participants have questions.

items.title: Web Accessibility Training Courses
items.description: We offer web accessibility courses for all levels, from beginners to advanced professionals. Beginner courses cover the basics of accessibility and its application to websites. Intermediate courses focus on implementing WCAG guidelines, conducting audits, and integrating accessibility into UX design. Advanced courses address complex challenges, advanced techniques, and comprehensive compliance tests. Each course equips you with skills to create inclusive digital experiences.

items.title: Document Accessibility Training Courses
items.description: Our document accessibility training program offers courses for all skill levels. Beginners learn to create accessible documents in Word, PDF, and HTML. Intermediate courses cover Microsoft Office apps, templates, and checkers. Advanced courses focus on accessible forms, PDF/UA compliance, and applying WCAG. Specialized courses include multimedia, testing, fixing issues, and Universal Design. Each course features hands-on learning through online tutorials, workshops, and comprehensive resources.

items.title: Adobe InDesign Accessibility Training
items.description: Learn techniques to make content accessible in Adobe InDesign, covering text formatting, graphics, reading order, and accessible tags. Key topics include tagging for PDF export, alternative text, table headers, and ensuring proper flow for assistive technology. Advanced training covers complex table formatting, cross-references, layers, and form fields. Both courses offer certificates of completion and enhance skills in creating accessible digital documents.

items.title: Mobile Accessibility Training Courses
items.description: Gain a comprehensive understanding of native mobile accessibility, covering principles and best practices for iOS and Android applications. This intermediate to advanced course focuses on user needs, mobile design, and development techniques. Topics include content structure, custom actions, editable text fields, and testing strategies. Over two days, participants explore platform-specific accessibility features, UI components, color contrast, form interactions, and testing methodologies. The training ensures you can create inclusive, user-friendly apps for all users.

items.item: Ensure Legal Compliance: Stay ahead of regulations like ADA, WCAG, and other accessibility laws, avoiding costly penalties.
Reach a Broader Audience: Accessibility training helps you connect with a diverse audience, including individuals with disabilities.
Build Sustainable Practices: Incorporate accessibility into your workflows, reducing the need for expensive retroactive fixes.
Enhance Workplace Productivity: Empower your team with tools and environments designed for inclusivity, boosting morale and efficiency.
Boost Brand Reputation: Position your organization as an innovator in accessibility and a leader in social responsibility.

sections.title: Achieving Accessibility with Flexible & Tailored Trainings Paths
sections.description: At Accessibility Innovations, we recognize that every organization has unique needs and goals when it comes to accessibility. To address this, we offer flexible and tailored training delivery methods designed to fit your schedule, preferences, and learning objectives. Our training paths empower your team to build expertise in accessibility and confidently apply best practices.

items.title: In-Person Training at Your Location
items.description:
Our hands-on, customized accessibility training sessions are delivered by best accessibility experts directly at your workplace. These interactive workshops are ideal for engaging teams in collaborative learning environments and provide opportunities to address specific organizational challenges.

Key Features:

  • Fully customizable training agendas to align with your industry and goals.
  • Real-time Q&A sessions for immediate clarification of complex topics.
  • Group activities and role-playing exercises to reinforce learning outcomes.
  • Ideal for fostering team collaboration and hands-on problem-solving.

link.title: Learn More About In-Person Training at Your Location

items.title: Online Instructor-Led Training
items.description:
Join real-time virtual classes led by our expert instructors, offering the convenience of online learning without compromising on interactivity. These sessions are designed for both teams and individuals, with structured schedules and comprehensive guidance.

Key Features:

  • Scheduled sessions with live instructors to maintain engagement and structure.
  • Interactive discussions, breakout rooms, and assignments to enhance learning.
  • Opportunities to address specific questions and apply concepts to real-world scenarios.
  • Perfect for remote teams or individuals looking for guided learning experiences.

link.title: Learn More About Online Instructor-Led Training

items.title: Online Self-Paced Learning
items.description:
Access a comprehensive library of training materials, including video tutorials, case studies, and exercises, to learn at your own pace. This flexible option is designed for busy professionals who prefer a more independent approach.

Key Features:

  • 24/7 access to an extensive range of training modules covering all aspects of accessibility.
  • Interactive quizzes, downloadable resources, and practical exercises to reinforce understanding.
  • Allows learners to revisit materials and progress at their own speed.
  • Suitable for individuals or organizations seeking a cost-effective training option.

link.title: Learn More About Online Self-Paced Learning

items.title: Blended Learning
items.description:
Combine the benefits of in-person and online training for a hybrid approach that maximizes flexibility and effectiveness. Blended learning is ideal for teams that require both the personal touch of live sessions and the convenience of self-paced resources.

Key Features:

  • A mix of in-person workshops and online resources for a tailored experience.
  • Flexibility to schedule sessions that meet your team’s availability and learning preferences.
  • Deep-dive sessions into complex topics, complemented by real-time support from instructors.
  • Includes post-training support and follow-up materials to ensure ongoing success.

sections.description: Accessibility Innovations is your trusted partner in offering best in class accessibility trainings. Whether you’re looking to meet legal requirements, foster inclusivity, or enhance user experience, our tailored accessibility training programs provide the tools you need to succeed. Contact us today or fill in the form below to take the next step in building a more accessible and inclusive organization!

sections.description: By offering a variety of training methods, we ensure that organizations of all sizes and structures can enhance their accessibility knowledge and skills effectively. Whether you prefer immersive, real-time sessions or the flexibility of self-paced learning, we have a training path that meets your needs.

items.question: Why is Accessibility Training important for businesses?
items.answer: It helps organizations meet legal standards, broaden their audience, and foster inclusivity while enhancing brand reputation and mitigating risks.

items.question: What topics are covered in Accessibility Training?
items.answer: Our courses include topics such as ADA compliance, WCAG guidelines, accessible design, document accessibility, mobile accessibility, and more.

items.question: How long does the training take?
items.answer: The duration varies depending on the scope of the training, ranging from a few hours to multi-day workshops.

items.question: Can training be conducted online?
items.answer: Yes, we offer instructor-led virtual training and self-paced online learning options to suit your needs.

items.question: How does Accessibility Training help with legal compliance?
items.answer: Our training equips your team with the expertise needed to comply with ADA, WCAG, and other standards, reducing the risk of legal issues.

items.question: Is Accessibility Training suitable for small businesses?
items.answer: Absolutely! Our flexible training programs cater to businesses of all sizes, ensuring accessibility solutions for everyone.

items.question: How do I schedule training for my team?
items.answer: Contact us today to discuss your needs and arrange a training session customized to your goals.
